bird.name: Malagasy sacred ibis
bird.summary: The Malagasy sacred ibis (Threskiornis bernieri) is a relatively large, heavily built ibis endemic to the west coast of Madagascar, and Ald…

relations.subject: Malagasy sacred ibis
relations.evidence: The Madagascan population has been markedly declining mainly through unsustainable harvesting of eggs, nest site disturbance and wetland habitat degradation. Human interference and habitat loss also pose threats to the abbotti race.Byers O, Brouwer K, Coulter M, Seal US
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Malagasy sacred ibis
relations.evidence: The Madagascan population has been markedly declining mainly through unsustainable harvesting of eggs, nest site disturbance and wetland habitat degradation. Human interference and habitat loss also pose threats to the abbotti race.Byers O, Brouwer K, Coulter M, Seal US
relations.object_summary: 旅游、施工和高频活动影响繁殖或觅食。

relations.subject: Malagasy sacred ibis
relations.evidence: Important areas of this species' habitat are threatened with pollution, sedimentation and encroachment of alluvial sands
relations.object_summary: 农药、工业污染与水体污染影响食物链安全。
